content:
Hi guys,

We have recently been notified of a potential NDA breach, where the Google Drive files might have been sharedwith people outside of the project. We are addressing this issue in private.
We are taking measures to improve file security:

The Google Drive folder access has been set to "Restricted" and only invited members will have access.

**We have sent a Google Group Invitation** to everyone;
You should find a invitation email like this in your inbox. If you don't see it, please check the Spam folder (mine went to spam😂 ).

Simply click on the link to join the "Morimens Volunteer Translators" group, then refresh the page, and you should have access to the Google Drive files.

Let us know if it is working for you!
